cliApiToken.description: Credential for the reserved default namespace. Auto-generated if not set. ENV: CLI_API_TOKEN

namespaceTokens.description: Independent credentials for non-default namespaces. ENV: HAPI_NAMESPACE_TOKENS_JSON

apiUrl.description: Hub URL for CLI connections. ENV: HAPI_API_URL

listenHost.description: Hub HTTP bind address. ENV: HAPI_LISTEN_HOST

publicUrl.description: Public URL for external access (e.g., Telegram Mini App). ENV: HAPI_PUBLIC_URL

telegramBotToken.description: Telegram Bot API token from @BotFather. ENV: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN

vapidKeys.description: Auto-generated Web Push VAPID keys. Do not edit manually.

machineId.description: Auto-generated unique machine identifier. Do not edit manually.

machineIdConfirmedByServer.description: Internal flag. Do not edit manually.

runnerAutoStartWhenRunningHappy.description: Auto-start runner when running hapi command.
